---
title: "Annual Imaging Symposium"
description: "The annual imaging symposium"
author: "Event"
date: "2026-02-20"
categories: [event]
image: "/files/images/placeholder2.JPG"
#css: /custom.css
#draft: true
---

The annual imaging symposium took place on February 20th at the VU.

# Program


<!--Include social share buttons-->

{{< include /files/includes/_socialshare.qmd >}}
